meta.name: Jothiram Sanjeevi
meta.title: Senior Software Engineer
meta.tagline: Backend Engineering · System Design · Cloud-Native Architecture
meta.description: Senior Software Engineer with 5.5+ years of experience designing and delivering enterprise-grade backend systems. Specializing in distributed systems, cloud infrastructure, API design, and scalable architectures that solve real business problems.
meta.availability: Open to senior engineering roles & consulting

summary: REST & event-driven API design at enterprise scale
Cloud infrastructure across Azure, AWS, and GCP
PostgreSQL, Redis, vector databases, and data pipelines
Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, and DevOps automation
Code quality, system reliability, and performance optimization
about.philosophy: I prefer solutions that fit real operational constraints—engineered for production, not just demos.

expertise.title: Backend Engineering
expertise.description: Designing and building robust server-side systems with FastAPI, Python, and modern frameworks. Clean API contracts, clear separation of concerns.

expertise.title: System Design
expertise.description: Architecting distributed, scalable systems. From database schema design to service topology—built for growth and operational clarity.

expertise.title: Cloud & DevOps
expertise.description: Full deployment lifecycle on Azure, AWS, and GCP. Kubernetes, Docker, CI/CD pipelines, and infrastructure-as-code for reliable delivery.

expertise.title: AI Integration
expertise.description: Integrating AI capabilities—RAG pipelines, LLM APIs, vector search—into production backend systems with proper evaluation and observability.

services.title: Backend Architecture
services.description: End-to-end design and implementation of scalable backend systems: API design, data modeling, service decomposition, and performance tuning.

services.title: Cloud Infrastructure
services.description: Cloud-native deployment, containerization, orchestration, and CI/CD pipelines. Reliable infrastructure that scales with your business.

services.title: AI & Data Systems
services.description: Integration of AI capabilities into enterprise backends. RAG pipelines, vector search, LLM orchestration, and data engineering.

projects.disclaimer: Due to confidentiality agreements and corporate policies, I am unable to publicly showcase several enterprise projects I have worked on. The projects displayed here represent selected work that can be shared publicly.

items.title: Knowledge Retrieval & RAG System
items.description: Built a production-grade Retrieval-Augmented Generation platform enabling accurate, cited answers from large enterprise document corpora.
bullets: Designed hybrid retrieval combining dense vector search (pgvector) with BM25 sparse retrieval, achieving significant improvement in answer relevance
Implemented a multi-stage reranking pipeline using cross-encoders, reducing hallucination rates in production
Built a FastAPI service layer with async processing, Redis caching, and observability hooks for enterprise monitoring
Deployed on Azure Kubernetes Service with autoscaling, supporting concurrent enterprise users

items.title: Multi-Agent Workflow Orchestration
items.description: Designed and implemented an agentic orchestration layer enabling LLM-powered workflows to interact with enterprise data sources, APIs, and business logic.
bullets: Engineered a tool-calling framework with structured outputs and retry logic for reliable agent actions
Implemented stateful agent memory using Redis and PostgreSQL for session continuity across long workflows
Built a supervisor agent pattern for delegating subtasks to specialized sub-agents, improving task completion rates
Created comprehensive evaluation harness to benchmark agent correctness, latency, and cost per workflow

items.title: Microservices Platform Migration
items.description: Led the migration of a legacy monolithic backend to a modern microservices architecture, enabling independent deployment and clear ownership boundaries.
bullets: Decomposed a monolith into domain-bounded services communicating via REST and async event queues
Designed and implemented PostgreSQL schemas per service, with clear data contracts and migration strategies
Containerized all services with Docker, orchestrated on Kubernetes with proper health checks, resource limits, and rollout strategies
Established CI/CD pipelines reducing deployment time significantly while improving release reliability

stack.title: Languages & Frameworks
stack.description: Core languages and backend frameworks used across production systems.

stack.title: Data & Storage
stack.description: Databases, caching, and vector stores for enterprise-scale data needs.

stack.title: Cloud & Infrastructure
stack.description: Cloud platforms, container orchestration, and infrastructure tooling.

stack.title: AI & Data Tooling
stack.description: Libraries and platforms for building AI-integrated backend systems.

process.title: Understand
process.description: Define the problem space, constraints, and business goals before any design decisions are made.

process.title: Architect
process.description: Design clear system boundaries, data flows, and API contracts with scalability and maintainability in mind.

process.title: Implement
process.description: Build with production quality: clean code, test coverage, documentation, and observability from day one.

process.title: Deliver
process.description: Deploy reliably with CI/CD, monitoring, and runbooks. Iterate based on real usage and feedback.
